title: AI Codebase Architecture Analyzer
html: RAG-based platform for ingesting GitHub repos and enabling AI-powered code Q&A with dependency graph visualization.

title: Hospital Website
html: Full-featured hospital website with patient portal, appointment booking, and doctor profiles.

title: Weather App
html: Real-time weather app with temperature, humidity, and forecast data for any location.

html: ML-powered stock price prediction app with trend analysis and historical data visualization.

title: Chat Bot
html: Intelligent chatbot powered by NLP and machine learning for automated user query responses.
